versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, audit, incident, raw-audit, drift, retention, permission, forensics or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible signal, alert type, incident type, report, dashboard metric or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.audit_versioning: Audit events are immutable; corrections use append-only correction events.
versioning_policy.security_policy_versioning: Security policies must be versioned and linked to admin_settings.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
